text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By winning all three of these races, Satono
Diamond has won the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: And... send. I think that was the last of the replies.
choice_data_list: Looks like it's shaping up to be a big event.
Looks like it's shaping up to be a big event.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears the Satono Group is hosting an event
at all of their locations to celebrate Satono
Diamond winning the Senior Autumn Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I said I would help as much as I can,
considering it's an event in my honor.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I hear the cafe will start serving Senior Autumn
Triple Crown parfaits starting today. I thought I
would stop by and say hello.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If you have some time, would you like to come
with me?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe, great! ♪ Shall we head off?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Satono. I was just on my way to see you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Did you need something from me?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to congratulate you. Are you busy right
now?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm on my way to the Satono Group's
cafe...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh! If you'd like, why don't you come with us to
try the Senior Autumn Triple Crown parfait?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Did you say parfait?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's right. They're offering a limited edition
parfait to celebrate my Senior Autumn Triple
Crown. I'm heading there now to look at the cafe
and try a sample.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Limited edition! I... see. Well, seeing as it is a
special occasion, I shall accompany you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to congratulate you both once more on
winning the Senior Autumn Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's an achievement that required you to defeat
me, Teio, and Kitasan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's safe to say that your personal contributions,
and indeed those of the entire Satono family, are
radiant gems of the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...You've worked so hard, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Th-thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'm acting all wise and mature because I'm a
little older, but we're actually the same.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
As rivals, and as athletes on whom the weight of
our family names rest. Let us both push each
other to even greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll continue to work diligently!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's still so much that I wish to learn from you.
However...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I need to try things out for myself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I also need to keep the fact that I represent my
family fixed firmly in mind!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That's true, but if you ever have any trouble,
don't hesitate to talk to me. We are school
friends, after all.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You're every bit as wonderful as I knew you would
be... That's why I've always looked up to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm honored. Soon enough, I'm sure there
will be many people that look up to you as well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Your turn to be a role model is around the corner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I understand. I just hope I can help others as much
as you've helped me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you will be just fine. Isn't that right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... both of you! Hehehe, I'm so
happy... ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, the parfaits are going to melt! Let's dig in!
Please have as much as you'd like, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems there's no celebration more gratifying for
Satono Diamond than Mejiro McQueen's praise!
